info.name: Missing Security Headers
author: security-all-in-one
info.description: Checks for missing security headers (CORS, CSP, HSTS, X-Frame, etc.)

request:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: www.doctolib.fr
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Security Scanner)
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
response:
HTTP/1.1 429 Too Many Requests
Connection: close
Content-Length: 138512
Accept-Ch: Sec-CH-UA-Bitness, Sec-CH-UA-Arch, Sec-CH-UA-Full-Version, Sec-CH-UA-Mobile, Sec-CH-UA-Model, Sec-CH-UA-Platform-Version, Sec-CH-UA-Full-Version-List, Sec-CH-UA-Platform, Sec-CH-UA, UA-Bitness, UA-Arch, UA-Full-Version, UA-Mobile, UA-Model, UA-Platform-Version, UA-Platform, UA
Cache-Control: private, max-age=0, no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, post-check=0, pre-check=0
Cf-Mitigated: challenge

Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8

Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp
Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin
Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin
Date: Mon, 23 Mar 2026 19:58:21 GMT
Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:01 GMT
Origin-Agent-Cluster: ?1
Permissions-Policy: accelerometer=(),browsing-topics=(),camera=(),clipboard-read=(),clipboard-write=(),geolocation=(),gyroscope=(),hid=(),interest-cohort=(),magnetometer=(),microphone=(),payment=(),publickey-credentials-get=(),screen-wake-lock=(),serial=(),sync-xhr=(),usb=()

<head>
  <title></title>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <link rel="icon" href="https://www.doctolib.fr/favicon.ico">
  <style>
    html {
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    body {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      height: 100vh;

      background-color: #0b5fa2; /* Fallback color for readability */
      background-image: url('data:image/png;base64,');
      background-size: cover;
      background-position: center;
      background-repeat: no-repeat;
      background-attachment: fixed;
      font-family: "Roboto", Arial, sans-serif;
    }

    .container {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      text-align: center;
      flex: 1;
      height: 100vh;
      width: 100%;
      color: white;
      margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .dl-main-navbar {
      display: flex;
      position: fixed;
      top: -30px;
      width: 100%;
      justify-content: center;
      z-index: 100;
    }

    .dl-main-navbar-logo {
      width: 120px;
      height: 120px;
    }

    h1 {
      font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-size: 26px;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      margin-bottom: 40px;
    }

    p {
      font-family: 'Roboto', Arial, sans-serif;
      font-weight: 400;
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .doctologo {
      background-image: url("data:image/png;base64,");
    }

    /* Language divs shown via JavaScript based on TLD */
    [class^="lang-"] {
      display: none;
      padding: 0 20px;
    }

  </style>

  </main>
  <script type="text/javascript">
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
      if (window.ReactNativeWebView) {
        window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({ method: 'webviewReady' }));
        window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({ method: 'challengeRequested' }))
      }

      var hostname = window.location.hostname;
      var parts = hostname.split(".");
      var tld = parts[parts.length - 1];
      var support_msg = document.getElementById('support_msg');
      var help_title = document.getElementById('help_title');
      var tips_banner = document.getElementById('tips_banner');
      var please_wait = document.querySelector("[data-translate='please_wait']");
      var redirecting = document.querySelector("[data-translate='redirecting']");
      var turn_on_js = document.querySelector("[data-translate='turn_on_js']");
      var turn_on_cookies = document.querySelector("[data-translate='turn_on_cookies']");

      if (tld == "de") {
        support_msg.innerHTML = "Support-Code:";
        document.title = "Sind Sie ein Mensch ?";
        help_title.innerHTML = "Wir müssen kurz überprüfen ob Sie auch wirklich ein Mensch und kein Roboter sind...";
        tips_banner.innerHTML = "Wenn Sie Probleme haben, schalten Sie Ihr VPN aus und aktualisieren Sie Ihren Browser oder Ihre App.";
        if (please_wait)      please_wait.innerHTML = "Warten Sie eine Minute, wir überprüfen Ihren Browser ...";
        if (redirecting)      redirecting.innerHTML = "Weiterleitung läuft ...";
        if (turn_on_js)       turn_on_js.innerHTML = "Bitte aktivieren Sie JavaScript und laden Sie die Seite neu, um das CAPTCHA validieren zu können.";
        if (turn_on_cookies)  turn_on_cookies.innerHTML = "Bitte aktivieren Sie die Nutzung von Cookies und laden Sie die Seite neu, um das CAPTCHA validieren zu können.";
      } else if (tld == "it") {
        support_msg.innerHTML = "Tracking per il supporto:";
        document.title = "Sei umano ?";
        help_title.innerHTML = "Dobbiamo verificare che sia davvero un essere umano...";
        tips_banner.innerHTML = "Se riscontri problemi, disattiva la VPN e aggiorna il browser o l'app.";
        if (please_wait)      please_wait.innerHTML = "Aspetta un attimo, stiamo controllando il tuo browser ...";
        if (redirecting)      redirecting.innerHTML = "Reindirizzamento in corso ...";
        if (turn_on_js)       turn_on_js.innerHTML = "Attiva JavaScript e ricarica la pagina per poter convalidare il CAPTCHA.";
        if (turn_on_cookies)  turn_on_cookies.innerHTML = "Abilita i cookie, quindi ricarica la pagina per poter convalidare il CAPTCHA.";
      } else if (tld == "fr") {
        support_msg.innerHTML = "Code pour le support:";
        document.title = "Êtes-vous humain ?";
        help_title.innerHTML = "Nous avons besoin de vérifier que vous êtes bien humain...";
        tips_banner.innerHTML = "Si vous rencontrez des difficultés, désactivez votre VPN et mettez à jour votre navigateur ou application.";
        if (please_wait)      please_wait.innerHTML = "Attendez un petit instant, nous vérifions votre navigateur...";
        if (redirecting)      redirecting.innerHTML = "Redirection en cours...";
        if (turn_on_js)       turn_on_js.innerHTML = "Veuillez activer JavaScript puis recharger la page pour pouvoir valider le CAPTCHA.";
        if (turn_on_cookies)  turn_on_cookies.innerHTML = "Veuillez activer les cookies puis recharger la page pour pouvoir valider le CAPTCHA.";
      } else {
        support_msg.innerHTML = "Code for support:";
        document.title = "Are you human?";
        help_title.innerHTML = "We need to verify that you are human...";
        tips_banner.innerHTML = "If you encounter difficulties, disable your VPN and update your browser or application.";
        if (please_wait)      please_wait.innerHTML = "Please wait a moment while we check your browser...";
        if (redirecting)      redirecting.innerHTML = "Redirecting...";
        if (turn_on_js)       turn_on_js.innerHTML = "Please enable JavaScript and reload the page to validate the CAPTCHA.";
        if (turn_on_cookies)  turn_on_cookies.innerHTML = "Please enable cookies and reload the page to validate the CAPTCHA.";
      }
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>
